items.title: Planned Charlie Kirk Statue Gets Trolled
items.summary: Also: Trump shrinks two national monuments in Utah by 90%.

items.title: Pat Oleszko Wins $100K Whitney Biennial Prize
items.summary: The artist known for her irreverent inflatables gets the Bucksbaum Award; plus, there’s a new grant for artists living with cancer, Murmurs Gallery closes, and more news.

items.title: Artist’s Planned Monument to Charlie Kirk Gets Trolled Online
items.summary: “God gave me permission,” Sergio Furnani, the NYC sculptor behind the design, told Hyperallergic about his unsanctioned and widely decried work.

items.title: Manhattan DA’s Office Returns Three Antiquities to Mexico
items.summary: The office’s sixth repatriation to the nation included a Nayarit sculpture seized from The Met and an Aztec stone previously possessed by a convicted antiquities trafficker.
